summary: Matched and named several grRCruise stage functions, added stage callback/data setup, recovered grRCruise GroundVars fields, tightened grRCruise prototypes, and widened mpJointSetCb1 storage/parameter typing so collision callbacks can carry either Ground* or GObj-like objects.

key_files.role: Primary decomp work: added StageCallbacks table, recovered several grRCruise functions, renamed fn_* symbols, used Ground/JObj helpers, stage data lookup, dynamics setup, collision callback registration, and an inline user_data accessor for grRCruise_802010A4.
Header prototype cleanup for recovered grRCruise functions and renamed fn_* entries.
Recovered grRCruise GroundVars fields, including bitfields, counters, DynamicsDesc fields, and an HSD_GObj pointer, then added rcruise2 union arm.
Adjusted mpLib_Callback formatting and added an inline TODO noting callback first argument may need to be void* rather than Ground*.
Changed mpJointSetCb1 parameter from Ground* to void* and stored it into CollJoint.x28.
Updated mpJointSetCb1 declaration to accept void*.
Changed CollJoint.x28 from Ground* to void* to match mpJointSetCb1 usage.
Renamed grRCruise text symbols from fn_* to grRCruise_* and marked grRc_803E4F44 as data:string.

what_changed: Added implementations for grRCruise_801FF168, grRCruise_801FF2C8, grRCruise_801FF444, and grRCruise_801FF7A4 in src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c.
Introduced StageCallbacks grRc_803E4E34[7] and static grRc_804D6A10 storage in grrcruise.c.
Renamed fn_801FF444, fn_80200578, and fn_802010A4 symbols/prototypes/comments to grRCruise-prefixed names where changed.
Recovered grRCruise_801FF2C8 as returning HSD_GObj* and taking an int gobj_id, with Ground_GetStageGObj setup and OSReport failure path.
Added typed grRCruise GroundVars fields for bitfield xC4 and fields x0C/x10; added grRCruise_GroundVars2 with DynamicsDesc fields and xEC HSD_GObj* pointer.
Changed mpJointSetCb1 and CollJoint.x28 from Ground* to void*, while leaving mpLib_Callback first argument as Ground* with a TODO that it may need void*.
Updated symbols.txt for three grRCruise function names and one grRc data-string metadata annotation.
smart_moves: Updated owning headers when recovered function bodies exposed signatures, replacing several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS entries in grrcruise.h.
Used real GroundVars union arms and fields instead of leaving all grRCruise state as padding.
Changed mpJointSetCb1 storage to void* to reflect observed use passing a Ground_GObj* in grRCruise_801FF444, avoiding an inaccurate Ground* parameter at that API boundary.
Kept uncertain callback typing explicit with a TODO in mp/forward.h instead of silently pretending the mpLib_Callback signature was fully resolved.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching stage callbacks, recovering the stage-local callback table can unlock setup code and make gobj initialization routines expressible with StageCallbacks fields instead of raw address calls.
If a callback registration API stores an opaque object pointer and callsites pass non-Ground objects, type the storage/registration parameter as void* rather than forcing an inaccurate Ground*.
Recovering GroundVars fields and union arms can remove padding and clarify stage object state such as bitflags, DynamicsDesc storage, and linked HSD_GObj pointers.

naming_conventions.convention: Use subsystem-prefixed grRCruise_<address> names for identified Rainbow Cruise stage functions instead of generic fn_<address> names.
Use local short role names for common decomp objects when their role is clear: gp, gp2, jobj, gobj1/gobj4/gobj6, jgobj, grgobj.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use an inline wrapper returning arg0->user_data for grRCruise_802010A4 instead of GET_GROUND, with an explicit TODO noting GET_GROUND did not work directly.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: This is a narrow codegen tactic and should not be generalized without objdiff evidence; loaded PR evidence does not include build or objdiff output.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Cast grRCruise_802010A4 to mpLib_Callback at mpJointSetCb1 callsites while preserving the recovered grRCruise_802010A4 signature taking Ground_GObj*, s32, CollData*.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: The cast documents a callback signature mismatch; the PR itself includes a TODO that mpLib_Callback may need further typing work.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Update symbol metadata when function names and data-string classification become known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: The slice shows metadata edits but no separate validation output for symbol/data ownership.

follow_up_queries: mpLib_Callback void* Ground* GObj callback TODO
grRCruise_802010A4_inline GET_GROUND calling it directly didn't work

notes: PR body is empty and there are no issue comments, review comments, or reviews in the loaded slice.
Diff evidence is complete and supports changed-file, naming, typing, and source-shape observations.
No build, objdiff, checkdiff, or regression output is present, so matching claims are limited to the PR title/merge status and code changes rather than independent validation.
The inline TODO near mpLib_Callback and grRCruise_802010A4 indicates unresolved typing/codegen uncertainty; this intake preserves that uncertainty instead of treating it as a resolved standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Opaque callback payloads may require void* storage at registration boundaries
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2298, grRCruise_801FF444 passes a Ground_GObj* to mpJointSetCb1 while the collision joint stored the payload in CollJoint.x28. The PR changed mpJointSetCb1 and CollJoint.x28 from Ground* to void*, preserving the callback signature uncertainty separately.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage-local callback tables can clarify ground object setup matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2298 introduced grRc_803E4E34 as a StageCallbacks array and used indexed callback fields in grRCruise_801FF2C8 to set GX links, callbacks, and procs for stage gobjs.

source_update_candidates.title: grRCruise stage code uses grRCruise-specific GroundVars and StageCallbacks
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2298 added grRc_803E4E34 StageCallbacks in src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c and added grRCruise_GroundVars/rcruise2 fields in src/melee/gr/types.h for Rainbow Cruise stage state.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped context for future grRCruise matching and type recovery; should be curated as a source/path fact rather than promoted automatically.

source_update_candidates.title: mpJointSetCb1 payload storage was widened to void*
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2298 changed mpJointSetCb1(int joint_id, Ground*, mpLib_Callback) to mpJointSetCb1(int joint_id, void*, mpLib_Callback) and changed CollJoint.x28 from Ground* to void*. The PR also left a TODO that mpLib_Callback's first argument may need to become void* because it can be a GObj or Ground.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially important API typing fact and unresolved TODO for future mpLib callback cleanup.

source_update_candidates.title: grRc_803E4F44 marked as data:string
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2298 changed config/GALE01/symbols.txt metadata for grRc_803E4F44 at .data:0x803E4F44 size 0x6C from a generic object annotation to data:string.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol/data metadata change may be useful for data ownership records, but no independent data validation is present in the PR slice.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all mpLib_Callback signatures should be changed to void* from this PR alone; the diff contains only a TODO and a partial boundary change.
Do not treat the grRCruise_802010A4 inline user_data wrapper as a global replacement for GET_GROUND; the source comment says GET_GROUND did not work directly here, but no objdiff evidence is loaded.
Do not claim specific functions are fully matched beyond the PR title and merged status; the slice lacks objdiff/checkdiff output.
